prompt: Some estimator methods here should only appear when a delegated sub-object actually supports them, so that feature-detection checks report them honestly. Where is the decorator that hides or exposes a method based on such a runtime condition, and where is the descriptor object it returns implemented?

rubric.answer_shape: one decorator function, one descriptor class

evidence.claim: decorator that conditionally exposes a method
the descriptor implementing the conditional behaviour

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
